intended_use: qCT LN Quant is a software device used in the tracking, assessment and quantitative characterization of detected pulmonary nodules. This automatically analyzes user-selected regions within lung CT to
intended_use_full: qCT LN Quant is a software device used in the tracking, assessment and quantitative characterization of detected pulmonary nodules. This automatically analyzes user-selected regions within lung CT to provide volumetric, diameter and computer analysis based on morphological characteristics in a single study, or over the time course of several thoracic studies. The system performs the measurements, allowing the preview of lung nodules in 2D and 3D reconstructed views and the respective measurements to be displayed. It is indicated for the evaluation of user detected solid pulmonary nodules.
target_condition: Solid pulmonary nodules ≥6mm on chest CT
ground_truth: Ground truth established by three expert radiologists who independently read scans and marked nodule boundaries in all slices
other_metrics: Median Absolute Normalized Error—Short Axis Diameter: 14.3% (95% CI 13.95-16.67); Long Axis Diameter: 11.1% (95% CI 9.52-12.50); Volume: 20.7% (95% CI 17.29-22.41)
